description: Sheetlabs is a platform for turning spreadsheets into APIs and managing the underlying data, users, and access controls. It also hosts some public data APIs, including the Rig Veda and Vedic Society APIs referenced in public OpenAPI registries.
summary: Sheetlabs exposes a REST Administrative API on app.sheetlabs.com authenticated with HTTP Basic auth using a Sheetlabs account password or API auth token, and the verified public Sheetlabs-hosted open-data REST APIs Rig Veda and Vedic Society with published OpenAPI specs and no authentication.
